rationale: Y verifies the design against actual upstream vLLM source with concrete file:line citations (utils.py:408-415, weight_utils.py:1361, fp8.py:227-233) and independently reconstructs nearly every point the human reviewer made (mapper placement for direct vs delegated loaders, qwen2_old's silent-degrade cleanup, test-coverage gap around real checkpoint resolution) plus catches the latent gap — the diffusion hunyuan_image3_transformer.py loader was a known-affected caller dropped from this PR's scope. X covers similar correctness ground but with weaker, PR-description-sourced grounding, a messier/truncated output, and explicitly dismisses the diffusion-transformer file as 'no broken code' — actively missing the latent gap rather than just failing to mention it.
